## Storage boundary

This file stores aggregate operating state only. The private target list, names,
email addresses, phone numbers, handles, DM content, private repository details,
and private preview information remain outside design-ai.

When activity begins, update only the date, state, and aggregate counts in one
source-controlled change. Candidate-specific status belongs on the candidate Issue
through exactly one P16 lifecycle label. Consent and private pilot evidence stay
in the approved participant-controlled location.
